title: NothingOS 3.2(Spacewar-V3.2-250926-1631)
description:
What's New in This Update General Improvements and Bug Fixes

🖼️ Photos widget now fills the space when resized to 4×2.
🗣️ Fixed the issue of abnormal profile picture display in Settings.
💿 Fixed album cover and song info display errors in the Media Player and widget.
🚗 Optimised compatibility with cars for more stable connections.
🔗 Improved overall Bluetooth connection stability.
⚙️ Enhanced overall system stability and smoothness.
🛡️ Updated to September security patch.

Notes:
Your device may use more power and feel warmer during installation. Performance will return to normal after the update is complete.
